verses.text: Topa aw, ka thungetna hong za in la, ka thumna hong ngai in
Ka cihmawh hunin kei kiang panin bu kei in. Keima lam hong nga in la, kong sap ciangin hong dawng pah in
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntakna, meikhu bangin beimang a, ka pumpi meikuang bangin a sa hi
Lungkham luatna hangin lopa bangin ka keutum a, an nangawn ka nezo kei hi
A gingin ka tautauna hangin ka guh guakin ka om hi
Gamlaka om musane leh mun kolhna-ah a om simbu tawh ka kibang hi
Ihmu theiloin ka om a, innkhum dawna vasa khat guak a om tawh ka kibang hi
Sun nilohin ka galte in kei hong zahko uh a, kei hong simmawhte in ciamsiatna-in ka min a zang uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh vut bek ka annek hita a, na thangpaihna leh na hehna hangin ka tuidawnte khitui tawh kihel hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in kei hong domto napi-in lei nong den'na hi
Keima nuntakna pen nitak lama a om nilim tawh kibang lel a, lopa bangin ka vulgawp hi
Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang na kip ngitnget a, khang tawntungin nang hong kiphawkna kip hi
Nangmah tho-in Zion khua na hehpih ding hi. Amah na angvan hun ding hita a, a kiciangtansa hun hong tung khin hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasemte in tua khua suangtumte it uh a, a leivuite nangawn pammaih sa uh hi
Minamte in Topa hong zahtakin, leitung kumpi khempeuh in na minthan'na hong zahtak ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Zion khua lam ding a, ama minthan'na hong kilang ding hi
Amah in mi cimawhte' thungetna kinin, amau' thumna simmawhlo ding hi
A suak nailo mite in Topa a phat theihna dingin a hong tung laiding khang mite-a' dingin hih thu kiciamteh hen

Mihingte, kumpi gamte, Topa a bia dingin a kikaihkhop uh ciangin, mite in Zion khuasungah Topa' min, Jerusalem khuasungah amah phatna a pulak theihna dingun, thongkiate' taunate a za ding leh a si dingin a kisehte a khahkhia dingin a sangna ama siangtho mun panin amah in hong ensukin, vantung panin Topa in leitung hong en hi
Amah in kei a khangtung kimlai ka thahatna hong suktat sakin, ka hunte hong khiapsak hi
Keimah in, “Khang tawntungin a kip ka Pasian aw, hong khan'sihsak kei in,” ka ci hi
Tanglai hunin nangmah in leitung bulpi na koih a, vantungte zong nangma khut tawh na bawlsa ahi hi
Amaute sia ding uh a, ahih hangin nang na kip ding hi. Puan bangin amaute paatkhia ding uh hi. Nangmah in amaute puan bangin na khek a, amaute a maimang uh hi
Ahi zongin nang na kibang ngitnget a, na nuntak hun in mong neilo hi
Na nasemte' tate lungmuangin om ding uh a, amau' suanlekhakte na mai-ah kip ding uh hi.
